meta.title: Sen. Lamar Alexander Discusses his Hudson Event on the Senate Floor on C-SPAN
meta.description: Senator Lamar Alexander (R-TN) discussed "The New Promise of American Life: Less from Washington, More from Ourselves" at a special event held at Hudson Institute on December 3, 2010.
